title: The Limits of Academia: On "Describing" a Complex World
excerpt: We need to step back from forcing simple "explanations" onto things, and instead focus on "describing" complex phenomena exactly as they are—in all their complexity.

title: Launching Field Notes: Redrawing Lines and Connecting Spaces
excerpt: Welcome to my research blog. Here is a brief introduction to what this space is about and the intellectual journeys we will embark on.
